title: lithocarpus densiflorus var. montanus
intro: Lithocarpus densiflorus var. montanus, also known as the mountain live oak, is a variety of evergreen tree that belongs to the beech family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Lithocarpus densiflorus var. montanus can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
